items.name: Scarab Amulet
items.description: A carved lapis scarab humming with old battle-magic. Your troops strike harder.

items.name: Veil of Sands
items.description: Woven from enchanted sandstorm dust. Blows deflect blows.

items.name: Obsidian Edge
items.description: A shard of volcanic glass bound to your hero's will. Each strike cuts deeper.

items.name: Cursed Eye of Set
items.description: The god's gaze grants savage fury — but rots the bearer's guard. Cannot be discarded.

items.name: Serpent Band
items.description: A coiling bronze band. The serpent spirit inside quickens your warriors' legs.
